---
title: "Advanced Topics"
---

## What Lives Here

The advanced track is where the site moves into:

- real analysis
- optimization
- numerical methods
- control and dynamics
- stochastic control and dynamic programming
- matrix analysis
- learning theory
- high-dimensional probability
- high-dimensional statistics
- information theory

## Live Advanced Modules

- [Real Analysis](real-analysis/index.qmd)
- [Optimization](optimization/index.qmd)
- [Numerical Methods](numerical-methods/index.qmd)
- [ODEs and Dynamical Systems](odes-and-dynamical-systems/index.qmd)
- [Control and Dynamics](control-and-dynamics/index.qmd)
- [Stochastic Control and Dynamic Programming](stochastic-control-and-dynamic-programming/index.qmd)
- [Matrix Analysis](matrix-analysis/index.qmd)
- [Learning Theory](learning-theory/index.qmd)
- [High-Dimensional Probability](high-dimensional-probability/index.qmd)
- [High-Dimensional Statistics](high-dimensional-statistics/index.qmd)
- [Information Theory](information-theory/index.qmd)

## Real Analysis

[Real Analysis](real-analysis/index.qmd) is the rigor bridge from calculus into theorem-heavy work.

Its current first-pass spine is:

- [Rigorous Convergence](real-analysis/concepts/rigorous-convergence.qmd)
- [Continuity, Compactness, and Completeness](real-analysis/concepts/continuity-compactness-completeness.qmd)
- [Sequences and Series of Functions](real-analysis/concepts/sequences-and-series-of-functions.qmd)
- [Differentiation and Integration as Theorems](real-analysis/concepts/differentiation-and-integration-as-theorems.qmd)
- [Fixed-Point, Implicit, and Inverse Function Ideas](real-analysis/concepts/fixed-point-implicit-and-inverse-function-ideas.qmd)

This module is where the site makes limits, continuity, compactness, and theorem-level calculus explicit enough for advanced probability, optimization, and learning theory.

## Optimization

[Optimization](optimization/index.qmd) is the first fully mature advanced module with a complete five-page spine:

- [Convex Sets and Separation](optimization/concepts/convex-sets-and-separation.qmd)
- [Convex Functions and Subgradients](optimization/concepts/convex-functions-and-subgradients.qmd)
- [Constrained Optimization, KKT, and Lagrangians](optimization/concepts/constrained-optimization-kkt-and-lagrangians.qmd)
- [Unconstrained First-Order Methods](optimization/concepts/unconstrained-first-order-methods.qmd)
- [Duality and Certificates](optimization/concepts/duality-and-certificates.qmd)

It is the natural bridge from the foundation stack into convexity, duality, certificates, first-order methods, and research-facing mathematical modeling.

## Numerical Methods

[Numerical Methods](numerical-methods/index.qmd) is the computation bridge from exact mathematics to finite-precision algorithms.

Its current study route is:

- [Floating-Point, Conditioning, and Backward Error](numerical-methods/concepts/floating-point-conditioning-and-backward-error.qmd)
- [Numerical Linear Systems and Factorizations](numerical-methods/concepts/numerical-linear-systems-and-factorizations.qmd)
- [Iterative Methods and Preconditioning](numerical-methods/concepts/iterative-methods-and-preconditioning.qmd)
- [Numerical Least Squares and Regularization](numerical-methods/concepts/numerical-least-squares-and-regularization.qmd)
- [Eigenvalue and SVD Computation](numerical-methods/concepts/eigenvalue-and-svd-computation.qmd)
- [Approximation, Differentiation, Integration, and Error Control](numerical-methods/concepts/approximation-differentiation-integration-and-error-control.qmd)
- [Time-Stepping for ODEs and Stability](numerical-methods/concepts/time-stepping-for-odes-and-stability.qmd) - optional extension toward ODEs and simulation

This module is where the site turns exact linear-algebra, calculus, and optimization objects into actual computations that live in floating point and must be judged by conditioning, stability, and error.

## ODEs and Dynamical Systems

[ODEs and Dynamical Systems](odes-and-dynamical-systems/index.qmd) is the continuous-time bridge from local rules for change to trajectories, equilibria, and stability.

Its current live route is:

- [First-Order ODEs, Existence, and Solution Curves](odes-and-dynamical-systems/concepts/first-order-odes-existence-and-solution-curves.qmd)
- [Second-Order Systems, State Variables, and Reduction to First Order](odes-and-dynamical-systems/concepts/second-order-systems-state-variables-and-reduction-to-first-order.qmd)
- [Linear Systems, Matrix Exponentials, and Modes](odes-and-dynamical-systems/concepts/linear-systems-matrix-exponentials-and-modes.qmd)
- [Phase Portraits, Equilibria, and Local Stability](odes-and-dynamical-systems/concepts/phase-portraits-equilibria-and-local-stability.qmd)
- [Lyapunov Functions, Invariant Sets, and Long-Time Behavior](odes-and-dynamical-systems/concepts/lyapunov-functions-invariant-sets-and-long-time-behavior.qmd)
- [Discretization, Time-Stepping, and the Bridge to Control](odes-and-dynamical-systems/concepts/discretization-time-stepping-and-the-bridge-to-control.qmd)
- [Time-Stepping for ODEs and Stability](numerical-methods/concepts/time-stepping-for-odes-and-stability.qmd) - adjacent numerical bridge
- [Research Bridges: Reverse-Time SDEs, Probability-Flow ODEs, Flow Matching, and Control](odes-and-dynamical-systems/concepts/research-bridges-reverse-time-sdes-probability-flow-odes-flow-matching-and-control.qmd) - optional research bridge into continuous-time ML

This module is where the site turns derivatives into actual continuous-time models, qualitative dynamics, and the language needed for later control and simulation.

## Control and Dynamics

[Control and Dynamics](control-and-dynamics/index.qmd) is the systems-facing bridge from passive dynamics to feedback, estimation, and steering.

Its current first-pass spine is:

- [State-Space Models, Inputs, and Outputs](control-and-dynamics/concepts/state-space-models-inputs-and-outputs.qmd)
- [Controllability, Reachability, and Observability](control-and-dynamics/concepts/controllability-reachability-and-observability.qmd)
- [Feedback, Stability, and Pole Placement](control-and-dynamics/concepts/feedback-stability-and-pole-placement.qmd)
- [Linear Quadratic Regulation and Riccati Intuition](control-and-dynamics/concepts/linear-quadratic-regulation-and-riccati-intuition.qmd)
- [Estimation, Kalman Filtering, and the Separation Principle](control-and-dynamics/concepts/estimation-kalman-filtering-and-the-separation-principle.qmd)
- [Model Predictive Control and Constraint Handling](control-and-dynamics/concepts/model-predictive-control-and-constraint-handling.qmd)
- [Learning-Based Control, System Identification, and RL Bridges](control-and-dynamics/concepts/learning-based-control-system-identification-and-rl-bridges.qmd)

Closest companion pages:

- [Discretization, Time-Stepping, and the Bridge to Control](odes-and-dynamical-systems/concepts/discretization-time-stepping-and-the-bridge-to-control.qmd)
- [Time-Stepping for ODEs and Stability](numerical-methods/concepts/time-stepping-for-odes-and-stability.qmd)

This module is where the site turns trajectories into systems with actuation, sensing, feedback, and optimization over behavior.

## Stochastic Control and Dynamic Programming

[Stochastic Control and Dynamic Programming](stochastic-control-and-dynamic-programming/index.qmd) is the uncertainty-aware bridge from control and probability into sequential decision-making.

Its current first-pass spine is:

- [Controlled Markov Models, Policies, and Cost Functionals](stochastic-control-and-dynamic-programming/concepts/controlled-markov-models-policies-and-cost-functionals.qmd)
- [Finite-Horizon Dynamic Programming and Backward Induction](stochastic-control-and-dynamic-programming/concepts/finite-horizon-dynamic-programming-and-backward-induction.qmd)
- [Infinite-Horizon Value Functions, Bellman Equations, and Contractions](stochastic-control-and-dynamic-programming/concepts/infinite-horizon-value-functions-bellman-equations-and-contractions.qmd)
- [Value Iteration, Policy Iteration, and Approximate Dynamic Programming](stochastic-control-and-dynamic-programming/concepts/value-iteration-policy-iteration-and-approximate-dynamic-programming.qmd)
- [Stochastic Linear Systems, LQG, and the Separation Principle](stochastic-control-and-dynamic-programming/concepts/stochastic-linear-systems-lqg-and-the-separation-principle.qmd)
- [Continuous-Time Stochastic Control and Hamilton-Jacobi-Bellman Intuition](stochastic-control-and-dynamic-programming/concepts/continuous-time-stochastic-control-and-hamilton-jacobi-bellman-intuition.qmd)
- [Partial Observability, Belief States, and RL/Control Bridges](stochastic-control-and-dynamic-programming/concepts/partial-observability-belief-states-and-rl-control-bridges.qmd)

This module is where the site turns sequential choices under uncertainty into explicit objects like policies, transition laws, cost-to-go structure, belief states, and planning under hidden information.

## Matrix Analysis

[Matrix Analysis](matrix-analysis/index.qmd) is the operator-level bridge between linear algebra and modern theory-facing math.

Its current first-pass spine is:

- [Norms and Operator Norms](matrix-analysis/concepts/norms-and-operator-norms.qmd)
- [Positive Semidefinite Matrices and Quadratic Forms](matrix-analysis/concepts/positive-semidefinite-matrices-and-quadratic-forms.qmd)
- [Spectral Inequalities and Variational Principles](matrix-analysis/concepts/spectral-inequalities-and-variational-principles.qmd)
- [Perturbation and Stability](matrix-analysis/concepts/perturbation-and-stability.qmd)
- [Trace, Determinant, and Matrix Functions](matrix-analysis/concepts/trace-determinant-and-matrix-functions.qmd)

This module is where the site turns matrices into operator-sized, spectral, quadratic-form, and matrix-function objects instead of only arrays with eigenvalues.

## Learning Theory

[Learning Theory](learning-theory/index.qmd) is the current bridge from the site's math backbone into theorem-level ML guarantees.

Its current first-pass spine is:

- [ERM, Population Risk, and Hypothesis Classes](learning-theory/concepts/erm-population-risk-and-hypothesis-classes.qmd)
- [PAC Learning, Sample Complexity, and the Learning Setup](learning-theory/concepts/pac-learning-sample-complexity-and-the-learning-setup.qmd)
- [VC Dimension and Shattering](learning-theory/concepts/vc-dimension-and-shattering.qmd)
- [Uniform Convergence and Generalization Bounds](learning-theory/concepts/uniform-convergence-and-generalization-bounds.qmd)
- [Rademacher Complexity and Data-Dependent Capacity](learning-theory/concepts/rademacher-complexity-and-data-dependent-capacity.qmd)
- [Algorithmic Stability and Regularization](learning-theory/concepts/algorithmic-stability-and-regularization.qmd)
- [Generalization in Modern Regimes](learning-theory/concepts/generalization-in-modern-regimes.qmd)

This module is where the site turns empirical risk, population risk, hypothesis classes, and generalization into explicit mathematical objects.

## High-Dimensional Probability

[High-Dimensional Probability](high-dimensional-probability/index.qmd) is the next theory-facing layer after classical probability and learning theory.

Its current live opening is:

- [Concentration Beyond Basics](high-dimensional-probability/concepts/concentration-beyond-basics.qmd)
- [Sub-Gaussian and Sub-Exponential Variables](high-dimensional-probability/concepts/sub-gaussian-and-sub-exponential-variables.qmd)
- [Random Vectors, Isotropy, and Norms](high-dimensional-probability/concepts/random-vectors-isotropy-and-norms.qmd)
- [Random Matrices and Spectral Concentration](high-dimensional-probability/concepts/random-matrices-and-spectral-concentration.qmd)
- [High-Dimensional Phenomena](high-dimensional-probability/concepts/high-dimensional-phenomena.qmd)
- [High-Dimensional Probability for Learning Theory and Modern ML](high-dimensional-probability/concepts/high-dimensional-probability-for-learning-theory-and-modern-ml.qmd)

This module is where the site shifts from scalar probability intuition to non-asymptotic control of maxima, norms, random vectors, and random matrices.

## High-Dimensional Statistics

[High-Dimensional Statistics](high-dimensional-statistics/index.qmd) is the statistical layer that sits directly on top of high-dimensional probability, matrix analysis, and optimization.

Its current live opening is:

- [Sparsity and Regularization](high-dimensional-statistics/concepts/sparsity-and-regularization.qmd)
- [Lasso and Compressed Sensing Basics](high-dimensional-statistics/concepts/lasso-and-compressed-sensing-basics.qmd)
- [Design Geometry: Restricted Eigenvalues, Coherence, and RIP](high-dimensional-statistics/concepts/design-geometry-restricted-eigenvalues-coherence-and-rip.qmd)
- [High-Dimensional Regression](high-dimensional-statistics/concepts/high-dimensional-regression.qmd)
- [Covariance, PCA, and Spectral Estimation in High Dimension](high-dimensional-statistics/concepts/covariance-pca-and-spectral-estimation-in-high-dimension.qmd)
- [Minimax and Lower Bounds](high-dimensional-statistics/concepts/minimax-and-lower-bounds.qmd)
- [Inference in High Dimension](high-dimensional-statistics/concepts/inference-in-high-dimension.qmd)

This module is where the site turns `p >> n`, sparse structure, shrinkage, and recoverability into explicit statistical objects instead of vague intuitions about “many features.”

## Information Theory

[Information Theory](information-theory/index.qmd) is the uncertainty-and-limits bridge connecting probability and statistics to coding, communication, and many ML objectives.

Its current live opening is:

- [Entropy, Cross-Entropy, and KL Divergence](information-theory/concepts/entropy-cross-entropy-and-kl-divergence.qmd)
- [Mutual Information, Conditional Entropy, and Data Processing](information-theory/concepts/mutual-information-conditional-entropy-and-data-processing.qmd)
- [Typicality, Source Coding, and Compression Intuition](information-theory/concepts/typicality-source-coding-and-compression-intuition.qmd)
- [Channel Coding, Capacity, and Converse Proofs](information-theory/concepts/channel-coding-capacity-and-converse-proofs.qmd)
- [Rate-Distortion and Representation Tradeoffs](information-theory/concepts/rate-distortion-and-representation-tradeoffs.qmd)
- [Variational Objectives, ELBO, and Information Bounds](information-theory/concepts/variational-objectives-elbo-and-information-bounds.qmd)
- [Information-Theoretic Lower Bounds in Statistics, Learning, and Communication](information-theory/concepts/information-theoretic-lower-bounds-in-statistics-learning-and-communication.qmd)

This module is where the site turns entropy, divergence, coding cost, and communication limits into explicit reusable objects instead of isolated formulas.

## Planned Next Advanced Modules

- `Signal Processing and Estimation`
